upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal widens the parent eta=0 independent-cumulant contact premise to an eta-bounded co-kurtosis leakage class and gives an explicit eta=0 parent reduction.

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: inclusion/common-cumulant-matching boundary at eta=0

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: common-restriction LP/VAR equivalence including sign restrictions

repo_prior_art.cite: none beyond exempt parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 eta=0 cumulant-matching gap

published_prior_art.cite: LanneLiuLuoto2026 identifies shocks under absent co-skewness/co-kurtosis but does not define an LP/SVAR critical leakage radius

repo_prior_art.cite: parent eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: two-shock witness without eta-leakage residual/reflection formula

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021 gives higher-moment rank conditions, not an LP-support-angle leakage formula

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship comparator chain cites PlagborgMollerWolf2021, GourierouxMonfortRenne2017, LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017, and LanneLiuLuoto2026 by bibkey only, with no section/page/equation anchor for the specific gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The closed-form two-shock flagship support result cites Guay2021 and AriasRubioRamirezWaggoner2018 without a location-level anchor tying their rank/rotation results to the claimed missing leakage formula.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add location-level anchors in each §8 why-new block: PMW theorem/section for common-restriction portability, Lanne-Liu-Luoto proposition/section for co-kurtosis absence, and Guay theorem/section for higher-moment rank conditions.

State the semi-algebraic optimization defining eta_w^*(P) as an explicit finite-dimensional program with variables, constraints, and norm convention, so the critical radius is visibly computable rather than only an infimum definition.

For Conjecture 2, spell out the two-shock off-diagonal residual coordinates and prove in the sketch why the coefficient norm used in L_eta(Q) matches the displayed ||r_4||_off formula under the chosen structural basis.

recommended_next_step: Revise the §8 comparator anchors and make the eta_w^*(P) optimization program explicit; the upgrade delta itself survives.
